articles.title: BREAKING: Suspicious Changes Allegedly Made to PEPE Smart Contract
articles.description: According to the last minute development, the number of signatures required to make changes to the PEPE multisig wallet has been allegedly reduced from five to two. There is no definitive confirmation about the development yet. After the news, there was a 13 percent decline in the price of PEPE. Allegedly, after the smart contract […] Continue Reading: BREAKING: Suspicious Changes...

articles.title: XRP Lawsuit: Trial Date Revealed As Three Lawyers From SEC’s Legal Team Quit Case
articles.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has lost three attorneys from its legal team amid news that a federal judge has scheduled a trial for the remaining arguments in the case with Ripple Labs.

articles.title: Shopify enables USDC payments via Solana Pay integration
articles.description: Shopify now supports Web3 commerce features like cross-border transactions and NFT loyalty schemes through its integration with Solana Pay

articles.title: Dogecoin Millionaire Explains Why He’s Still Bullish On DOGE Despite Taking Heavy Losses
articles.description: Investing in cryptocurrencies like Dogecoin can be tricky, as the nascent market is known to be the most volatile in terms of price movement. One day, an investor triples his investment, and the next day, all of it is gone. So knowing when to sell and exit a position can sometimes be challenging. This is the recent case of a once-DOGE millionaire who has seen the worth of his holdings fall...

articles.title: Bitcoin back at US$26,500 as crypto mirrors Wall Street gains
articles.description: Bitcoin rose on Thursday morning in Asia to trade in the US$26,500 range. Ether also moved up. Solana led the winners in the top 10 non-stablecoin tokens.
